subcodes.first_line: It is well known that the wayfarers unto God, after passing the way stations of what is other than he, arrived at the renowned place known as Istanbul
subcodes.first_line_orig: معلوم بوده که مسافران الی الله بعد از طی مراتب ماسواه بمحل معروف که مشهور
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
